name: Winvest Group Ltd
summary: Winvest Group Ltd (WNLV) is a Nevada corporation operating through wholly owned subsidiaries: The Catalyst Group Entertainment (TCG), a Beverly Hills-based film finance and production company seeking $6M-$24M to invest in global film, TV, and media projects; IQI Media, Inc., a California media company; and Billie Black Production LLC. TCG focuses on pre-sale distribution, tax incentive financing, and gap/mezzanine financing for film and entertainment projects.

products.name: Film Finance Services
products.description: Pre-sale distribution financing securing minimum guarantees and license fees for film and media projects.

products.name: Tax Incentive Financing
products.description: Financing secured by state government tax incentive programs for media productions, with 8-12% interest rates.

products.name: Gap/Mezzanine Financing
products.description: Financing secured by unsold territories for media projects, recouped after pre-sale loans within 12-18 months.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
